creator: jjneely@linuxczar.net
text:
I have a newer Schiit Asguard 3 with the Unison DAC module.  It also does not work at all.

Can I fund someone in looking at this bug?

pcm4: <Schiit Audio Schiit Unison Universal Dac> on uaudio0 (1p:1v/0r:0v) default
	snddev flags=0x200002e7<SIMPLEX,AUTOVCHAN,SOFTPCMVOL,BUSY,MPSAFE,REGISTERED,VPC,PRIO_WR>
	[pcm4:play:dsp4.p0]: spd 48000, fmt 0x00200010/0x00201000, flags 0x00002100, 0x00000006
	interrupts 54, underruns 0, feed 53, ready 0 [b:3072/1536/2|bs:2048/1024/2]
	channel flags=0x2100<BUSY,HAS_VCHAN>
	{userland} -> feeder_mixer(0x00200010) -> feeder_format(0x00200010 -> 0x00201000) -> {hardware}
	pcm4:play:dsp4.p0[pcm4:virtual:dsp4.vp0]: spd 48000, fmt 0x00101000/0x00200010, flags 0x10000000, 0x00000063
	interrupts 0, underruns 0, feed 0, ready 0 [b:0/0/0|bs:8192/1024/8]
	channel flags=0x10000000<VIRTUAL>
	{userland} -> feeder_root(0x00101000) -> feeder_format(0x00101000 -> 0x00100010) -> feeder_matrix(1.0 -> 2.0) -> feeder_volume(0x00200010) -> {hardware}
